overall.description: A bus simulator game showing a first-person perspective from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm. The bus drives through a modern European city, overtakes a truck, stops at a bus shelter to pick up passengers, and continues down wet streets with active windshield wipers.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street in heavy rain

events.description: bus overtakes a large red cargo truck on the left side
merges back into the right lane after completing the overtake

agents.ego_description: driving the bus through heavy rain with windshield wipers active, overtaking a slow truck

notable_agents.action: large red cargo truck being overtaken on the left
red car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: windshield covered in raindrops with active wipers
driver's instrument panel with MAN branding and digital displays
large red semi-truck with white trailer
multi-story modern buildings with glass facades lining the street
row of green trees along the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through a heavy downpour on a multi-lane city street, overtaking a large red truck on the left. Modern glass buildings line the right side while trees line the left, with rain streaking across the windshield as the wipers move back and forth.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching covered bus stop on city street

events.description: bus slows down significantly to approach the bus stop
bus comes to a complete stop at the bus shelter

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at a bus stop to pick up waiting passengers

notable_agents.action: group of people waiting under the bus shelter

entered.detail: covered bus stop with glass panels and bench
yellow pole with bus stop signage

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a covered bus stop on the right where several pedestrians are waiting under the shelter. The vehicle slows down and comes to a stop at the curb, with the modern city buildings still visible along the street.

events.description: bus doors open to allow passengers to board
passengers board the bus through the front door
bus doors close after passengers finish boarding

agents.ego_description: stopped at the bus stop with doors open, allowing passengers to board the bus

notable_agents.action: woman in red pants boarding the bus first
man with backpack boarding after the woman

segments.scene_description: The bus remains stopped at the shelter with its doors open. Passengers board one by one from the sidewalk into the bus interior. The interior bus lights illuminate the doorway area as people enter, then the doors close to prepare for departure.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with commercial outdoor seating

events.description: bus accelerates away from the bus stop

agents.ego_description: pulling away from the bus stop and continuing down the rain-soaked street past outdoor cafes

notable_agents.action: green truck passing in the opposite direction

entered.detail: restaurant patio with red umbrellas and outdoor seating
row of bicycles parked along the sidewalk railing
white zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls away from the stop and continues down the wet street, passing outdoor cafes with red umbrellas and parked bicycles. The windshield wipers maintain a steady rhythm as the bus approaches a pedestrian crossing and continues through the rainy urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-slicked city street to pick up passengers. It begins with the bus accelerating through a heavy downpour to overtake a large red truck, with rain streaking across the windshield and wipers moving in a steady rhythm against a backdrop of modern glass buildings. As the bus slows, the camera glides toward a covered shelter where pedestrians wait, eventually coming to a complete stop at the curb. The scene then shifts focus to the open doors as passengers board under the glow of interior lights, before the doors close and the bus pulls away from the sidewalk. Finally, the vehicle continues down the wet urban road, passing outdoor cafes with red umbrellas and parked bicycles while approaching a pedestrian crossing in the persistent rain.
